title: Contact
overview: Hibiki Kanzaki is a reporter for a news company, however this changes when a mysterious alien invasion appears.

title: Ishtar
overview: Hibiki tries to teach Ishtar about human culture and society.

title: Festival
overview: Ishtar and Hibiki try to figure out where Ishtar came from.

title: Marduk Disorder
overview: Hibiki is kidnapped and tortured by the mysterious alien force. Ishtar undergoes a purification processes, in the holy shrine of Alus Nova.

title: Station Break
overview: Hibiki is sent to prison for revealing the secret truth about the Marduck invasion.

title: Sing Along
overview: Ishtar comes back to planet Earth and tries to find out the secret hidden truth to Alus.
